fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the record.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the record.

fields.name: Commission %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to calculate the salesperson's commission.

fields.name: Image
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture that has been inserted for the salesperson or purchaser.

fields.name: Privacy Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the salesperson/purchaser is coupled to a user in Dataverse.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salesperson's email address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salesperson's or purchaser's telephone number.

fields.name: Next Task Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the next task assigned to the salesperson.

fields.name: No. of Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open opportunities handled by the salesperson.

fields.name: Estimated Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total estimated value of all the opportunities handled by the salesperson. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated current value of all the opportunities handled by the salesperson. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a date filter.
If this field contains the starting and ending dates for a time period, fields such as No. of Interactions, Cost (LCY), Duration (Min.), and Sales/Purchases (LCY) will display information for that time period only.
You can enter a date or a time interval. There are certain rules for how they should be entered.

fields.name: No. of Interactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of interactions handled by this salesperson.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of all the interactions handled by the salesperson. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total duration of all the interactions handled by the salesperson. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Job Title
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salesperson's job title.

fields.name: Action Taken Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an action taken filter.
The following options exist:
Next

Previous

Updated

Jumped

Won

Lost


For example, if this field contains the Next option, then fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities for which that particular action was the last action taken.

fields.name: Sales Cycle Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales cycle filter.
If this field contains a sales cycle code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities created using that particular sales cycle.

fields.name: Sales Cycle Stage Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales cycle stage filter.
If this field contains a sales cycle stage code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities currently under that particular stage.

fields.name: Probability % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a probability filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities having that particular probability.

fields.name: Completed % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a percentage completed filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities with that degree of completion.

fields.name: Avg. Estimated Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the average estimated value of the opportunities handled by the salesperson.

fields.name: Avg.Calcd. Current Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the average calculated current value of the opportunities handled by that salesperson.

fields.name: Contact Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a contact filter.
If this field contains a contact number, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities linked to that particular contact.

fields.name: Contact Company Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a contact company filter.
If this field contains Yes, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities linked to contact companies.

fields.name: Campaign Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a campaign filter.
If this field contains a campaign number, fields in the To-dos window and in the Opportunities window only display information related to opportunities linked to that particular campaign.

fields.name: Estimated Value Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an estimated value filter.
If this field contains an amount (LCY), fields in the Opportunities window only display information related to opportunities with that particular estimated value.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a calculated current value filter.
If this field contains an amount, fields in the Opportunities window only display information related to opportunities with that particular calculated current value.

fields.name: Chances of Success % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a chances-of-success filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields in the Opportunities window only display information related to opportunities with that particular chance of success.

fields.name: Task Status Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a to-do status filter. There are five options: Not Started, In Progress, Completed, Waiting and Postponed.
If this field contains a status, fields in the To-dos window only display information related to to-dos with that particular status.

fields.name: Closed Task Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a closed to-do filter.
If this field contains Yes, fields such in the To-dos window only display information related to closed to-dos.

fields.name: Priority Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a priority filter. There are three options: Low, Normal and High.
If this field contains a priority, fields in the To-dos window only display information related to to-dos with that particular priority.

fields.name: Team Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a team filter.
If this field contains a team code, fields in the To-dos window only display information related to to-dos assigned to that particular team.

fields.name: Opportunity Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more opportunity entries are linked to the salesperson.

fields.name: Task Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more to-do entries are linked to the salesperson.

fields.name: Close Opportunity Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for closed opportunities.

fields.name: Search E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salesperson's e-mail address in upper case. The field is filled out automatically and is only used internally by the program.

fields.name: E-Mail 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a secondary email address for the salesperson. You can use this field to provide an alternative email address.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether this Salesperson can be assigned for new documents
